name: Custom Name Keychains & Bag Tags
short_desc: Pocket-sized custom name cutout on premium acrylic with matching hardware loops. Perfect for school bags or keys.

name: Premium Acrylic Bookmarks with Tassels
short_desc: Sleek, transparent or mirrored acrylic bookmarks custom-etched with names or quotes. Finished with beautiful silky tassels.

name: Laser-Cut Acrylic Fashion Earrings
short_desc: Lightweight, vibrant, and incredibly detailed statement earrings. Made with hypoallergenic premium hooks.

name: Custom 3D LED Acrylic Night Lamps
short_desc: A beautiful warm-glow solid wood USB LED base featuring a custom-etched acrylic plate. Perfect for kids' bedrooms or logos.

name: Custom Acrylic Pet ID Tags & Plating
short_desc: Ultra-durable personalized tags for dogs, cats, or horse stable plaques. Custom engraved with contact phone details.

name: Premium House Number & Name Plates
short_desc: Sleek architectural address signs and room plates. Weatherproof double-layered acrylic or timber wood finishes.

name: Premium Commercial Signs & Branding Boards
short_desc: From desktop QR display stands to massive 900x1300mm corporate wall boards. Seamless panel joining available.
